## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and plan the creation of graphics and blog post layout for GrowthX's Series A funding announcement.](https://fathom.video/share/SssWBsEMtxMGLoDpZAUsP2w74MiuASGt?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Two main graphics needed: 1) Series A hero image, 2) Bento-style graphic with key info](https://fathom.video/share/SssWBsEMtxMGLoDpZAUsP2w74MiuASGt?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Blog layout updated to two-column style, similar to Sequoia Capital's blog](https://fathom.video/share/SssWBsEMtxMGLoDpZAUsP2w74MiuASGt?tab=summary&timestamp=358.0)
  - [Ed to work on integrating newsletter into blog and make technical changes](https://fathom.video/share/SssWBsEMtxMGLoDpZAUsP2w74MiuASGt?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [Renato to provide approved founder photos and real-time feedback via Figma](https://fathom.video/share/SssWBsEMtxMGLoDpZAUsP2w74MiuASGt?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

## Topics

### Team Introduction and Background

  - [Ed: Developer with design skills, 10+ years SaaS experience](https://fathom.video/share/SssWBsEMtxMGLoDpZAUsP2w74MiuASGt?tab=summary&timestamp=44.0)
  - [Ed's co-founder (Jason): Creative powerhouse](https://fathom.video/share/SssWBsEMtxMGLoDpZAUsP2w74MiuASGt?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
  - [Working together for 6-7 years, best friends](https://fathom.video/share/SssWBsEMtxMGLoDpZAUsP2w74MiuASGt?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [Team of 10 people in 360m² office space](https://fathom.video/share/SssWBsEMtxMGLoDpZAUsP2w74MiuASGt?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Renato: Recently joined GrowthX (2-3 weeks ago), 20+ years in tech](https://fathom.video/share/SssWBsEMtxMGLoDpZAUsP2w74MiuASGt?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Renato's role: Leading design, contributing and assembling team](https://fathom.video/share/SssWBsEMtxMGLoDpZAUsP2w74MiuASGt?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)

### Blog Layout Updates

  - [Changed to two-column layout with square images and text on top](https://fathom.video/share/SssWBsEMtxMGLoDpZAUsP2w74MiuASGt?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Inspired by Sequoia Capital's blog design](https://fathom.video/share/SssWBsEMtxMGLoDpZAUsP2w74MiuASGt?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [Content page updated with centered post layout](https://fathom.video/share/SssWBsEMtxMGLoDpZAUsP2w74MiuASGt?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [Current typeface not ideal for long-form reading](https://fathom.video/share/SssWBsEMtxMGLoDpZAUsP2w74MiuASGt?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Ed made fixes to the blog, but it's currently empty (only one post)](https://fathom.video/share/SssWBsEMtxMGLoDpZAUsP2w74MiuASGt?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)

### Series A Announcement Graphics

  - [Blog feature image needed](https://fathom.video/share/SssWBsEMtxMGLoDpZAUsP2w74MiuASGt?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Fundraise hero image: Similar to provided example](https://fathom.video/share/SssWBsEMtxMGLoDpZAUsP2w74MiuASGt?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
  - [Bento-style graphic for social media sharing](https://fathom.video/share/SssWBsEMtxMGLoDpZAUsP2w74MiuASGt?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [Key info: $12M Series A round, Madrona (lead investor), other notable investors](https://fathom.video/share/SssWBsEMtxMGLoDpZAUsP2w74MiuASGt?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
      - [Founder photos (separate or combined)](https://fathom.video/share/SssWBsEMtxMGLoDpZAUsP2w74MiuASGt?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
      - [Product system representation](https://fathom.video/share/SssWBsEMtxMGLoDpZAUsP2w74MiuASGt?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [Ed to work on integrating newsletter into the blog](https://fathom.video/share/SssWBsEMtxMGLoDpZAUsP2w74MiuASGt?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [Need to address messy Strapi setup from previous agency](https://fathom.video/share/SssWBsEMtxMGLoDpZAUsP2w74MiuASGt?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
  - [Figuring out how to handle featured images and in-blog images](https://fathom.video/share/SssWBsEMtxMGLoDpZAUsP2w74MiuASGt?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)

### Brand Consistency

  - [Graphics should align with GrowthX brand](https://fathom.video/share/SssWBsEMtxMGLoDpZAUsP2w74MiuASGt?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
  - [Emphasis on minimal and simplistic design](https://fathom.video/share/SssWBsEMtxMGLoDpZAUsP2w74MiuASGt?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
  - [Flexibility to tweak brand components as needed](https://fathom.video/share/SssWBsEMtxMGLoDpZAUsP2w74MiuASGt?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ed to prioritize creating main Series A callout graphic and bento-style info graphic](https://fathom.video/share/SssWBsEMtxMGLoDpZAUsP2w74MiuASGt?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Renato to select and approve founder photos for public use](https://fathom.video/share/SssWBsEMtxMGLoDpZAUsP2w74MiuASGt?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
  - [Renato to share Figma file with approved photos for real-time feedback](https://fathom.video/share/SssWBsEMtxMGLoDpZAUsP2w74MiuASGt?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Ed to make technical changes to blog structure and image handling](https://fathom.video/share/SssWBsEMtxMGLoDpZAUsP2w74MiuASGt?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [Team to stick to GrowthX brand guidelines while keeping design minimal](https://fathom.video/share/SssWBsEMtxMGLoDpZAUsP2w74MiuASGt?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
  - [Renato available for DM support on design and press release translation questions](https://fathom.video/share/SssWBsEMtxMGLoDpZAUsP2w74MiuASGt?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
